query: SELECT workflow_state, COUNT(*) as cnt, ROUND(SUM(LENGTH(COALESCE(supporting_documents,'')) + LENGTH(COALESCE(damage_photos,'')) + LENGTH(COALESCE(incident_description,'')))/1024, 1) as text_data_kb FROM claims GROUP BY workflow_state ORDER BY cnt DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zQEb4HwERZa3vD.6f0bc5e32ffe --database YbS42LwGroxbVepAMjk4bS --execute SELECT workflow_state, COUNT(*) as cnt, ROUND(SUM(LENGTH(COALESCE(supporting_documents,'')) + LENGTH(COALESCE(damage_photos,'')) + LENGTH(COALESCE(incident_description,'')))/1024, 1) as text_data_kb FROM claims GROUP BY workflow_state ORDER BY cnt DESC;
